title: Cleanup handling of manifest push code
body:
This is a followup to the podman push handling manifest code.
The current manifest push code was bug and needed a change to the API Bindings in order to return the digest back to the caller.

This PR Fixes this as well as consolidates the code to use share the abi code base.
